The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $227,471,070Details
International Box Office $216,572,326
Worldwide Box Office $444,043,396
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $124,685,930
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,605,196
Total $127,291,126
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$69,283,690 (30.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.28 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$130,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,660 opening theaters/3,701 max. theaters, 8.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $395,429,366

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 3rd, 2007 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: September 12th, 2007 (Wide) (South Korea)
December 4th, 2024 (Limited) (South Korea)
Video Release: December 11th, 2007 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence and intense sequences of action
Running Time: 113 minutes
Franchise: Bourne
Plot point: Faulty Memory, Fugitive / On the Run, Hitmen, Secret Agent
Subgenre: Action Thriller

Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
